\quad Hidden width & 256 & all \\

\quad Goal-critic anneal end & $1.5\times 10^{7}$ & Goal \\
\quad Perf. warmup metric & \texttt{eval/episode\_success} & Goal \\
\quad Perf. warmup threshold & 50.0 & Goal \\
\quad Goal reach threshold & 0.5 & Goal \\
\quad Positive-class weight cap & 4.0 & Goal \\
\quad Goal-logit clamp (symmetric) & $\pm 4.0$ & Goal \\
